message:
fix: correct 5 bugs in workloads handler (#3729)

- Sort events by actual time.Time timestamps instead of formatted
  strings which produced incorrect ordering (#3718)
- Return/log errors from cluster labeling and label removal operations
  instead of silently discarding them with _ (#3719)
- Add nil check on AI provider response before accessing resp.Content
  to prevent nil pointer dereference (#3720)
- Add Limit to event list API calls to bound memory usage and prevent
  unbounded fetching (#3721)
- Replace direct float == comparison with math.Abs epsilon threshold
  to avoid floating-point precision bugs (#3722)

Closes #3718, closes #3719, closes #3720, closes #3721, closes #3722

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
